# Trigonometry for wall height

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for wall height: Trigonometry can be applied to find the height of a vertical wall when the length of a ladder and the angle it makes with the wall are known. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
